text: Free plan: Up to 3 projects, 1 team member, 10,000 API calls/month, 1GB storage, community support. No credit card required. Free plan is permanent — not a trial.

Pro plan $49/month (or $39/month billed annually): Unlimited projects, up to 10 team members, 500,000 API calls/month, 50GB storage, priority email support, custom domains, advanced analytics dashboard.

Enterprise plan from $299/month: Unlimited everything, SSO/SAML, audit logs, SLA guarantee (99.99% uptime), dedicated account manager, custom contracts, on-premise deployment option. Contact sales@stackbase.io for a quote.

Getting started: 1) Sign up at stackbase.io — takes 60 seconds. 2) Create your first project from the dashboard. 3) Copy your API key from Settings > API Keys. 4) Install the SDK: npm install @stackbase/sdk or pip install stackbase. 5) Make your first API call.

API rate limits: Free 100 requests/minute, Pro 1,000 requests/minute, Enterprise custom. Exceeding limits returns HTTP 429. Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset) are included on every response.

Native integrations: GitHub, GitLab, Slack, Jira, Linear, Vercel, AWS, Google Cloud, Stripe, Segment, Datadog, PagerDuty. Webhook support for any custom integration. Zapier and Make (Integromat) apps available.

Support channels: Documentation at docs.stackbase.io, community forum at community.stackbase.io, email support at support@stackbase.io (Pro: response within 4 hours, Free: within 2 business days), live chat for Enterprise. Status page: status.stackbase.io.

Security: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). EU data residency available on Pro and Enterprise. Penetration tested annually. Bug bounty program at hackerone.com/stackbase.

Official SDKs: JavaScript/TypeScript (npm: @stackbase/sdk), Python (pip: stackbase), Go, Ruby, Java. All SDKs are open-source on GitHub. Community-maintained SDKs for Rust, PHP, and .NET also available.

Billing: Monthly or annual subscription. Annual billing saves 20%. Invoices emailed on the 1st of each month. Accepted: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, ACH bank transfer (Enterprise). Cancel anytime — no cancellation fees, no lock-in.
